accepted_findings.rationale: Value-moving path lacks explicit proof/validation/challenge gate.
accepted_findings.recommended_fix: Require validated proof bundle and challenge-window expiry before releasing value.

accepted_findings.rationale: Tracked locked/reserved accounting is not decremented on value release, creating internal drift.
accepted_findings.recommended_fix: Decrement the matching locked/reserved accounting variable before transfer.

accepted_findings.rationale: Governance can change implementation/module state without any delay barrier.
accepted_findings.recommended_fix: Introduce timelock/schedule/ETA requirement before upgrade execution.

accepted_findings.rationale: Settlement path appears immediate after approval state with no explicit challenge/delay barrier.
accepted_findings.recommended_fix: Require block.timestamp >= approvedAt/readyAt + challengePeriod before settlement.

accepted_findings.rationale: Tracked locked/reserved accounting is not decremented on value release, creating internal drift.
accepted_findings.recommended_fix: Decrement the matching locked/reserved accounting variable before transfer.
